title: Residual Connections, Why They Work
tagline: Watch a 50-layer net die without skips, then heal in one click
summary: Train tiny nets at L = 4, 16, 64 layers with the residual switch on or off. Watch activations explode or vanish with depth, watch the loss surface go from rugged to smooth, and see why a one-line architectural trick made networks 100× deeper without breaking. Then visit the residual stream view that makes Transformers tick.
highlights: Train identical L-layer nets in your browser with skip connections on vs off; watch the L=64 plain net stall while the residual one keeps going.
Live activation magnitudes per layer — see them collapse exponentially without skips and stabilise with them.
Loss-surface 2-D slice with vs without residuals: rugged plain landscape vs smooth residual landscape (Li et al., 2018, in interactive form).
Residual stream view connecting ResNet to Transformer encoders.
